title: A Flexible Plan for the Art Exhibition
article_text: The artist decided to harbor a new idea for his exhibition, which combined comedy and abstract art. He planned to chase a unique theme that would not be horrible for viewers. A portrait of a sheep was stored in a tent near the storage area. The artist's lover helped him filter the best works for the show. They made a reasonable adjustment to the lighting to create a better atmosphere. A substitute painting was prepared in case the main piece was damaged. The gallery owner insisted that the innocent rat in the abstract piece be removed. It is the supplement of raw materials that made the portraits more precise. The universe of this exhibition was controversial, but the logic behind it was clear. The artist had to revise his grammar in the description to avoid confusion.

vocabulary.eng_def: to hold a thought or feeling in your mind
